# clawvisor_service_config (Resource)

Per-service configuration for a configurable adapter. `config` is an opaque JSON document stored verbatim; key ordering never causes a diff (semantic JSON equality).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Per-service configuration document. config is opaque JSON stored verbatim;
# key ordering never causes a diff (semantic JSON equality).
resource "clawvisor_service_config" "github" {
  service_id = "github"
  config = jsonencode({
    base_url = "https://api.github.com"
    retries  = 3
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String) The service config as a JSON object string.
- `service_id` (String) The service/adapter id (e.g. `github`). Changing it forces replacement.

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Config alias (defaults to `default`). Changing it forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite id `service_id:alias`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import id is "service_id:alias" (alias defaults to "default").
terraform import clawvisor_service_config.github github:default
```
